name: Basler Mehlsuppe
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook flour in a dry, hot skillet until light brown.
2. Add butter to the flour and mix well.
3. Add onions and cook until softened.
4. Add beef stock and bring to a boil.
5. Simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Serve with grated cheese. Optionally, add a dash of red wine if desired.
7. Serves 4
This is best when using homemade stock, although canned will do in a pinch.
